message.content: Create an API endpoint for user notifications

content.text: I'll create the notifications endpoint. Let me set up the route and controller.

message.content: We don't use try/catch in this project. Please read AGENTS.md — we use the Result type pattern for error handling.

content.content:
# Project Conventions
## Naming
- Functions: snake_case
## Error Handling
- Use Result<T, E> type, not try/catch
## Testing
- Run `deno lint` before `deno test`
- All tests in __tests__/ directories

content.text: Right, I should have read AGENTS.md first. Let me rewrite with Result type and also fix the function naming to snake_case.
Notifications endpoint created with Result type pattern and snake_case naming. All tests pass.
